section_miscategorizations.text: He also has a history of rheumatoid arthritis, currently managed with methotrexate.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The phrase focuses on current treatment (ongoing methotrexate therapy), which per instructions belongs in S unless framed as a treatment change or order. However, it is partly acceptable in A as past medical history/context for the assessment, so this is a minor rather than major organizational issue.
